title: CUBIC: Concept Embeddings for Unsupervised Bias Identification using VLMs
description_es: Este trabajo presenta CUBIC, un método para identificar sesgos en modelos de visión por computador de manera no supervisada utilizando embeddings de conceptos de modelos de visión-lenguaje (VLM).
abstract: Bias detection in computer vision models typically requires labeled data or manual inspection. This paper presents CUBIC (Concept Embeddings for Unsupervised Bias Identification using VLMs), a novel approach that leverages Vision-Language Models to automatically identify biases through concept embeddings. Our unsupervised method discovers spurious correlations and biased representations without requiring annotated bias labels.

citations.apa: Mendez, D., Bontempo, G., Ficarra, E., Confalonieri, R., & Díaz-Rodríguez, N. (2026). CUBIC: Concept Embeddings for Unsupervised Bias Identification using VLMs. In 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI).
citations.mla: Mendez, David, Gianpaolo Bontempo, Elisa Ficarra, Roberto Confalonieri, and Natalia Díaz-Rodríguez. "CUBIC: Concept Embeddings for Unsupervised Bias Identification using VLMs." 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI), 2026.
